product_overview: ScanLoyal is a mobile-first digital loyalty voucher SaaS for brick-and-mortar merchants. It provides authenticated business and customer experiences for branch lookup, geofenced check-ins, and loyalty engagement workflows.
core_goals: Enable secure user authentication for merchants and customers
Support business profile retrieval for authenticated users
Allow geofenced customer check-ins through protected APIs
Provide a backend foundation for multi-tenant loyalty operations

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Allows users to authenticate into the platform and obtain access tokens for protected operations.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with TokenResponse containing JWT access token
POST /api/v1/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with authentication error

features.name: Check-in API
features.description: Lets authenticated users create a geofenced check-in record for a branch or business location.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with TokenResponse containing JWT access token -> POST /api/v1/checkins with token and valid geolocation payload -> Receive 200 with Checkin record
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with TokenResponse containing JWT access token -> POST /api/v1/checkins without authentication token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with TokenResponse containing JWT access token -> POST /api/v1/checkins with invalid or out-of-range geolocation data -> Receive 400 or 403 error indicating check-in rejection

features.name: Business API
features.description: Returns authenticated business details for the logged-in merchant or tenant context.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with TokenResponse containing JWT access token -> GET /api/v1/business with token -> Receive 200 with Business details
GET /api/v1/business without authentication token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with TokenResponse containing JWT access token -> GET /api/v1/business for an unauthorized or inactive tenant -> Receive 403 Forbidden or 404 Not Found
